# checkov

Runs [Checkov](https://www.checkov.io/) against infrastructure as code, open source packages, container images, and CI/CD configurations.

This is a local copy of [`bridgecrewio/checkov-action`](https://github.com/bridgecrewio/checkov-action) (Apache-2.0, see [`LICENSE`](./LICENSE) and [`NOTICE`](./NOTICE)) vendored verbatim — same inputs, outputs, and behavior. We host it here because the upstream action publishes too many git tags for Renovate to enumerate releases; the vendored copy pins the checkov Docker image (`docker://ghcr.io/bridgecrewio/checkov:<tag>`) directly, which Renovate's built-in `github-actions` manager keeps up to date via the `runs.image` reference.

|             baseline             | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                      Path to a .checkov.baseline file to <br>compare. Report will include only failed <br>checks that are not in the <br>baseline                                                                                                                                                       |
|      bitbucket_app_password      | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                             Environment variable name for a Bitbucket <br>app password to perform basic auth <br>in order to scan external modules <br>sourced from a private Bitbucket repository. <br>To be used with bitbucket_usernam                                                                                                               |
|         bitbucket_token          | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                  Environment variable name for a Bitbucket <br>access token to scan external modules <br>sourced from a private Bitbucket repository                                                                                                                                                    |
|        bitbucket_username        | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                             Environment variable name for a Bitbucket <br>username to perform basic auth in <br>order to scan external modules sourced <br>from a private Bitbucket repository. To <br>be used with bitbucket_app_password                                                                                                              |

Off by default.                                                                                                                                                                              |

|               file               | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                                                         File with infrastructure code or packages <br>to scan                                                                                                                                                                                           |

|          output_format           | string |  false   |  `"sarif"`  |                                                                                                                                                                   The format of the output. cli, <br>json, junitxml, github_failed_only, or sarif (comma separated)                                                                                                                                                                     |
|      policy_metadata_filter      | string |  false   |             |                                                                             Comma separated key:value string to filter <br>policies based on Prisma Cloud policy <br>metadata. Format: policy.label=test,cloud.type=aws                                                                               |
| policy_metadata_filter_exception | string |  false   |             | Comma separated key:value string to exclude <br>filtered policies based on Prisma Cloud <br>policy metadata. When used with policy_metadata_filter, <br>the exceptions override any policies selected <br>asa result of the policy_metadata_filter flag.See <br>https://prisma.pan.dev/api/cloud/cspm/policy#operation/get-policy-filters-and-options for information on allowed filters. <br>Format: policy.label=test,cloud.type=aws  |
|          prisma-api-url          | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                                                            Prisma API URL for prisma platform <br>features                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|              quiet               | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                                                                       display only failed checks                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|  repo_root_for_plan_enrichment   | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                                     Directory containing the hcl code used <br>to generate a given plan file. <br>Use with `file`                                                                                                                                                                       |
|            skip_check            | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                                              Run scan on all checks but <br>a specific check identifier (comma separated)                                                                                                                                                                               |
|         skip_cve_package         | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                     Filter scan to run on all <br>packages except for a specific CVE <br>package identifier, e.g. CVE-2018-19788 (comma separated)                                                                                                                                                      |
|          skip_download           | string |  false   |             |                                                                                        Do not download any data from <br>Bridgecrew. This will omit doc links, <br>severities, etc., as well as custom <br>policies and suppressions if using an <br>API token. Note: it will prevent <br>BC platform IDs from being available <br>in Checkov.                                                                                          |
|          skip_framework          | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                                                                     skip a specific infrastructure                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|            skip_path             | string |  false   |             |                                                                          Path (file or directory) to skip, using regular <br>expression logic, relative to the current <br>working directory. Word boundaries are not <br>implicit; i.e., specifying "dir1" will skip <br>any directory or subdirectory named "dir1". <br>Ignored with -f. (comma separated)                                                                            |
|       skip_results_upload        | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                          Do not upload scan results to <br>the platform to view in the <br>console. Results are only available locally. <br>If you use the --support flag, <br>logs will still get uploaded.                                                                                                                            |
|            soft_fail             | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                                                       do not return an error code <br>if there are failed checks                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|           soft_fail_on           | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                                         Do not return an error code <br>only for specific check identifiers (comma separated)                                                                                                                                                                           |
|        tf_registry_token         | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                                     Environment variable name for a Terraform <br>registry token for scanning external modules <br>sourced from private registries                                                                                                                                                      |
|            tfc_token             | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                    (deprecated, use tf_registry_token) Environment variable name for a <br>Terraform Cloud token for scanning external <br>modules sourced from private registries                                                                                                                                      |
|      use_enforcement_rules       | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                 Use the Enforcement rules configured in <br>the platform for hard / soft <br>fail logic. See checkov help text <br>for more details on the nuances <br>of this option.                                                                                                                                  |
|             var_file             | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                           Variable files to load in addition <br>to the default files. Currently only <br>supported for source Terraform (.tf file), and <br>Helm chart scans. Requires using --directory, <br>not --file. (comma separated)                                                                                                            |
|           vcs_base_url           | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                             Environment variable name for the base <br>url of a self hosted VCS <br>with external modules. To be used <br>with vcs_username and vcs_token                                                                                                                                               |
|            vcs_token             | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                    Environment variable name for the password <br>(personal access token) for basic auth against a <br>self hosted VCS with external modules. <br>To be used with vcs_base_url and <br>vcs_username                                                                                                                     |
|           vcs_username           | string |  false   |             |                                                                                                                                   Environment variable name for the username <br>for basic auth against a self <br>hosted VCS with external modules. To <br>be used with vcs_base_url and vcs_token                                                                                                                                     |

## Outputs

<!-- AUTO-DOC-OUTPUT:START - Do not remove or modify this section -->

| OUTPUT  |  TYPE  |               DESCRIPTION                |
|---------|--------|------------------------------------------|
| results | string | The results from the infrastructure scan |

<!-- AUTO-DOC-OUTPUT:END -->

## Usage

```yaml
jobs:
  scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - uses: loft-sh/github-actions/.github/actions/checkov@checkov/v1
        with:
          directory: .
          framework: terraform
          soft_fail: "true"
          output_format: cli
```

## Notes

This is a Docker action; the caller must still check out the code it wants scanned. To bump checkov, let Renovate update the image tag in `action.yml` — do not re-point callers at the upstream action.
